A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR THURSDAY, JULY 31, 2025, AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 503. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: JOHNNY SENGMANY, NOT REPORTED.
